data.title: Cosmos Health expands Sky Premium Life in $1Bn+ Kuwait market; secures initial order of 65,000+ units.
data.description: On October 3, 2025, Cosmos Health Inc. revealed that its subsidiary, SkyPharm S.A., signed an exclusive distribution deal on September 28, 2025, with Diyar United to distribute the Sky Premium Life® nutraceuticals line in Kuwait. Cosmos Health is a prominent healthcare group listed on NASDAQ under the symbol COSM, operating globally in a vertically integrated manner. This agreement marks a significant step for the Company's expansion, tapping into the Kuwaiti market.

data.title: ETH bulls are cautiously optimistic after a 17% weekly gain. Breaking $5,000 hinges on institutional accumulation amid competition and quiet derivatives.
data.description: The likelihood of Ether surpassing $5,000 hinges on institutional accumulation, with increasing competition and unremarkable derivatives metrics constraining investor confidence.

data.title: First Hawaiian, Inc. (NASDAQ: FHB) will report Q3 2025 financial results on Oct 24, 2025, with conference call at 1:00 p.m. ET (7:00 a.m. HT).
data.description: On October 3, 2025, First Hawaiian, Inc. revealed intentions to disclose its financial results for the third quarter of 2025 on October 24, 2025, before the market opens. The company, listed on NASDAQ as FHB, will hold a conference call on the same day at 1:00 p.m. Eastern Time (7:00 a.m. Hawaii Time) to discuss the results.

data.title: Arcutis Biotherapeutics grants 94,500 stock units to 12 new employees under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
data.description: Arcutis Biotherapeutics, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company in Westlake Village, California, announced the granting of a total of 94,500 restricted stock units of Arcutis’ common stock to 12 new employees. The awards were given the green light by the Compensation Committee of Arcutis’ Board of Directors and were issued under the Arcutis Biotherapeutics, Inc. 2022 Inducement Plan on October 1, 2025. This move was deemed crucial in enticing the new employees to join Arcutis, as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Datavault AI to power Tokenized Dream Bowl XIV and Esports Championships on Jan. 11 at AT&T Stadium in TX, showcasing ADIO® and VerifyU® technologies.
data.description: Datavault's ADIO® and VerifyU® technologies will be featured in college football, Madden, team esports, and drone racing championships through partnerships with Cutting Edge Sports Management and FN Esports. These collaborations highlight Datavault's innovative technologies across various sports, benefitting athletes and enhancing the overall experience for fans.

data.title: Lawsuit challenges $100,000 H-1B visa fee, alleging harm to schools, hospitals, churches, and small businesses nationwide.
data.description: The lawsuit contends that the recently introduced fee would negatively impact various entities, including schools, hospitals, churches, and small businesses nationwide.

data.title: Eggo introduces limited-edition Stranger Things Strawberry Waffles, first-ever naturally-colored waffle, for fans to enjoy.
data.description: Fans will now have the chance to enjoy the delightful flavor of the brand's inaugural naturally-colored* Strawberry Waffle. This breakfast item is aimed to provide fans with the perfect fuel as they revisit the beloved Netflix series before its fifth and final season. The waffle is colored using sources from natural ingredients. Eggo has shaken up breakfast with this new offering, providing an exciting twist to the morning meal for its fans.

data.title: National Press Club President Mike Balsamo expresses concern over journalist Mario Guevara's deportation, highlighting threats to press freedom in the US.
data.description: On October 3, 2025, in Washington, the National Press Club expressed grave concerns regarding the expulsion of journalist Mario Guevara, stating that it sends a troubling message to media professionals in the United States. The incident highlights the issue of press freedom, as reporters may now be apprehensive about reporting the truth for fear of facing deportation. The removal of Guevara symbolizes a threat to journalistic independence and the free flow of information, impacting the ability of reporters to fulfill their duty to the public.
